environment.isolation: all tests and wheel construction ran in the isolated Vuoro packaging worktree; adapter downloads were SHA-256 checked against the immutable composition manifest

claims.property: the public repository provides both a disposable local Compose stack and a neutral Kustomize base without appservice credentials, endpoints, CNPG resources, or environment overlays
evidence: tests/test_deployment_assets.py requires the Compose stack, PostgreSQL initialization, Kustomize base, service deployment, and migration templates
the base README identifies concrete overlays, credentials, endpoints, namespaces, and backup policy as appservice-owned

claims.property: the runtime deployment receives only four runtime DSNs while four suspended per-domain migration jobs receive migration-only DSNs
evidence: deployment.yaml references vuoro-runtime-dsns and never vuoro-migration-dsns
migration-jobs.yaml contains four suspend:true Job templates using vuoro-migration-dsns
the checked packaged sprintctl, actionq, kctl, and auditctl migration commands each accepted --help invocation

claims.property: service packaging remains bound to immutable owner artifacts and demands an immutable OCI digest before an overlay can deploy it
evidence: all four release wheels downloaded from the checked-in composition manifest and matched its SHA-256 values
the service and client wheels built successfully, then the complete 30-test Vuoro suite passed
the Kustomize deployment and migration templates use an @sha256 placeholder that appservice must replace with the verified release digest

notes: Command sequence: uv sync --all-packages --all-extras; uv build --package vuoro-client --wheel --out-dir dist/vuoro-client; uv build --package vuoro-service --wheel --out-dir dist/vuoro-service; uv run pytest; result: 30 passed.
The four pinned release wheels were fetched with scripts/fetch_pinned_adapters.py and their SHA-256 values exactly matched packages/vuoro-service/composition/adapter-pins.json.
Docker CLI is unavailable in this workstation, so a container build was not claimed. No Kubernetes command, cluster, deployment, endpoint, or credential was accessed.

The implementation commit was created before this evidence packet so implementation_sha identifies the tested package implementation without self-reference. Independent verification and appservice rollout remain separate gates.
